div1.entryFree: Counter, adv., the wrong way, (in the language of huntsmen): a hound that runs c. and yet draws dry-foot well, Err. IV, 2, 39 (a quibble intended, there being two prisons called the Counter in the city of London). you hunt c. H4B I, 2, 102. this is c., you false Danish dogs, Hml. IV, 5, 110.
